name: G-9 sync with operator registries: compliance-add jurisdiction US Federal routes to us-government/ per §17 G-9
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://nist.gov/x --id us-x --jurisdiction "US Federal" --tree "$PWD/tree" --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'ns=us-government' err.txt && echo us_routed 1>&2
